text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I go to see a race on my day off,<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Come on, come on! Almost theeeere!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And she's done it! What an amazing<n>runaway
finish!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: YEAAAAAH! Congratulations! Thatwas sooo good!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yaaay! Awesome! So awesome! That<n>blew me
away too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Totally! It's like their hopes of<n>winning were
crashing into each other<n>and making sparks!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! So that's what made<n>everyone shine so
bright!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Sooo cool... I wish I could run like they<n>do. If only I
was that fast.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh?! If you wanna run, just run!<n>You'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But everyone told me to give up. I<n>always finish
dead last in races...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hrmmm... Then I'll give you a test!<n>And if you
pass, it means you'll be<n>able to race in the future!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
A test? I'm not sure I've got what it<n>takes to
pass...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: We'll seeee... It is a test, after all,and I'm a super-duper tough testgiver!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Think you're up for the challenge?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...Y-yeah! I'll try! I have to, 'cause<n>this is my
dream!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All riiiight! That's what I like tohear! Okay, let's get started!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
First, we're gonna play tag! And then,<n>we're
gonna play on the slides in the<n>park! And after
that, snack time!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Got it! ...Wait, is that stuff all that<n>tough to do?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No time for questions! Here we go!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Tag! Got ya! Okay, now for the slides!<n>Ooh, and
let's get some donuts from<n>that store over there!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Donuts? Yay! I want acream-filled one!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Phew! That concludes the test. And<n>now for the
result...

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Gulp...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You pass! With flying colors! You<n>really dug deep
till the very end, huh?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I passed?! Yay, I did it! So I can bea racer!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But, you know, that really wasn't a<n>"super-duper
tough" test.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Well, whatever life throws at<n>you, the only
correct answer is to try<n>your best, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
As long as you've got that same<n>desire to run,
you'll be fine! I know<n>you'll make your dreams
come true<n>someday!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I've been chasing my own dream<n>too—for a long,
loooong time. That's<n>why I'm running in all these
exciting<n>races!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Wow... You're right! One day, I'm<n>gonna be a
runner who shines super<n>bright, just like you!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna go tell my mom! Thanks<n>so much!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You've got this! Hehe, it's like I'm<n>looking at me
when I was that age.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! I'm feeling fired up all of a<n>sudden! Time
for a quick run!
